title: Set The Box
description: Welcome to Set The BOX, a fun and addictive physics-based puzzle game where you challenge your stacking skills and precision. The goal is simple: stack the boxes as high as you can without toppling them over. But beware, the higher you stack, the more unstable it gets! Features: Challenging Gameplay: Each level requires careful planning and precise control to stack the boxes perfectly. The gameplay is easy to pick up but hard to master. Intuitive Controls: Simply tap and hold to drop the boxes. The longer you hold, the more accurately you can position the boxes.
instructions: How to Play Tap and Hold Tap and hold the screen to drop a box The longer you hold the more precise your placement Stack Boxes Carefully stack the boxes on top of each other to build the tallest tower possible Avoid Toppling Be mindful of the bala
